subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto that sovereign Lord who alone is worthy and befitting, Who, through the hand of bounty and bestowral, hath proffered unto them that are endowed with insight and learning the wine of knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سلطانی را لایق و سزاست که بید بخشش و عطا اهل بینش و دانش را صهبای علم و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
